# viettelidc_ovpc_autoscale_group (Resource)

ViettelIDC Autoscale Group. All attributes are immutable (RequiresReplace / ForceNew). Read() uses list+filter because the API has no detail endpoint for ASG.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `desired_capacity` (Number) Desired number of instances. Immutable.
- `is_autoscale` (Boolean) Whether automatic scaling is enabled. Immutable.
- `launch_template_id` (String) ID of the Launch Template to use. Immutable.
- `max_size` (Number) Maximum number of instances. Immutable.
- `min_size` (Number) Minimum number of instances. Immutable.
- `name` (String) Autoscale Group name. Immutable.
- `scale_in_threshold` (Number) CPU % threshold to scale in. Immutable.
- `scale_out_threshold` (Number) CPU % threshold to scale out. Immutable.

### Optional

- `has_load_balancer` (Boolean) Whether the ASG is attached to a Load Balancer (default: false). Immutable.
- `metric_type` (String) Scaling metric type (default: "CPU"). Immutable.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Falls back to the provider default vpc_id when unset.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Autoscale Group ID assigned by the system.
